## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and align on effective approaches for creating valuable GrowthX.ai content.](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift to interview-style calls for ideation and capturing Kyle's authentic voice/insights](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Refine content creation process: Kyle to provide brief context/thoughts on sales calls for Rafid to build upon](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [GrowthX's sprint approach often faces initial friction but proves highly valuable; educating prospects on its benefits is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [AI integration in GrowthX's platform allows for nuanced, efficient content refinement, setting them apart in the market](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Process Improvement

  - [Move to interview-style calls for ideation and authentic voice capture](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Kyle to provide brief context/thoughts on sales calls (voicemail/text) for Rafid to build upon](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Bi-weekly sync calls to review and refine content direction](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### GrowthX's Sprint Approach

  - [Often faces initial friction from prospects (majority of cases)](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Not padding time, but the most labor-intensive part of engagements](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Benefits:](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Deep dive with technical teams and customers](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Educates GrowthX team at a deeper level](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Creates easy-to-feedback framework](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [Serves as an anchor point for ongoing collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### AI Integration in GrowthX Platform

  - [AI chat functionality allows for targeted content refinement](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Can highlight specific sections for improvement (e.g., "go deeper", "more examples", "friendlier tone")](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Enables live updates and changes without full content regeneration](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Streamlines workflow and impresses prospects with capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Sales Philosophy and AI Delegation

  - ["Can't delegate to AI what you can't delegate to a human" - Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Hands-on experience crucial for understanding work to be done](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [AI forcing shift away from over-specialization towards multi-hat roles](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Human intervention still vital in sales, especially for business decisions](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rafid to revise and schedule out existing posts](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Kyle to send sales call transcripts with brief context/thoughts](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Set up bi-weekly sync calls, with potential to adjust frequency as needed](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Rafid to create initial batch of posts based on new approach](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Explore giving Rafid an overview of the GrowthX platform in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/3f5Kbgbz8zM7Ugh4PYy-sKX1SNRfrdXm?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
